---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the template
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use case

Describe the situation you're in. What are you trying to do that the current template doesn't support well?

## Proposed change

What would you like to see added or changed? Be as specific as you can.

## Domain check

Would this change work for domains other than your own (e.g., a SaaS company, a law firm, a research lab)? If it's domain-specific, is there a way to generalize it?

## Alternatives considered

Any other ways you've thought about solving this?

## Additional context

Anything else — screenshots, links, related issues.
